note: When --crawl is passed, GateTest CLI silently ignores --module flags and runs only the liveCrawler module. To hit the static-analysis visual/accessibility/links modules, run gatetest WITHOUT --crawl. See sibling before-gatetest-static.txt for the static-source baseline.
